name: Seiji Yagiri
description: A classmate of Mikado's. He quits school claiming he has something more important to do with his life. He is very obsessed to his 'true love' who has scar on her head; revealing his psychopathic behaviours. He seems to rely on his sister's money for that.    ~!It is revealed that he is in love with Celty's head.!~
